If you cancel your subscription within 30 days of upgrading, you will automatically receive a full refund. No questions asked. You can cancel your subscription from your account settings.
Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your billing dashboard. When upgrading, the new features are available immediately, and your billing will be prorated.
Yes, we offer custom SLAs, dedicated account managers, and invoice billing for enterprise customers. Please contact our sales team to discuss your specific requirements.
